title: elder tales
description: this is an addon for 1.20.1Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks made by dahuang0610
body:
this is an addon for 1.20.1 Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks made by dahuang0610.This mod only adds new spells and does not modify any other content. I have included 20 spells that I designed myself, hoping to bring you all some fun. The values of all the newly added spells can be adjusted in the configuration file.
Version 1.3.6 of this mod is compatible with version 3.4.0.11 of Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks, and version 1.3.9 and 1.4.1 of this mod is compatible with version 3.15.5.1 of Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks. Due to the significant differences in the core code of Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks between these two versions, I am currently unable to make my mod compatible with both versions simultaneously.
